final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing museum infographic for Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume.

Style/medium: museum exhibition panel, historical costume catalog, cultural heritage infographic, rice white and pale tea paper texture background
Composition: fixed layout — top header with Chinese title/subtitle/intro, left structural breakdown with Chinese callout labels, upper-right material/texture samples, middle-right pattern/color symbolism section, bottom wearing sequence flowchart
Subject: Chinese ethnic minority traditional costume (full-body figure or central object breakdown)
Scene/backdrop: museum archival paper background, neutral professional exhibition setting
Lighting/mood: soft even archival lighting, scholarly and restrained atmosphere
Color palette: rice white, silk paper white, pale tea, muted earth tones, traditional ethnic colors
Materials/textures: silk, brocade, embroidery, silver ornaments, woven fabrics
Text (verbatim): 中国少数民族服饰
Constraints: all text must be simplified Chinese, clear and readable, no garbled characters, no English or pinyin, realistic structure and material accuracy, collectible scholarly quality
Avoid: poster aesthetic, studio photo feel, e-commerce style, anime illustration, cosplay vibe, messy labels, wrong structure, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration
